feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: imagine waking up to this every day 😱 I've had this hotel on my London bucket list for years and decided to stay here during my trip this week. Can't beat that Tower of London view!! You can even see the Tower Bridge popping out in the corner (I had the
entry.content: imagine waking up to this every day 😱 I've had this hotel on my London bucket list for years and decided to stay here during my trip this week. Can't beat that Tower of London view!! You can even see the Tower Bridge popping out in the corner (I had the

entry.title: put this on your Copenhagen bucket list!! 👇 I visited Copenhot, a unique take on the Nordic sauna experience, and it's my new favorite thing to do in the city. Tucked out on Refshaleøen is CopenHot, with hot tubs, cold plunge tubs and saunas all overlook
entry.content: put this on your Copenhagen bucket list!! 👇 I visited Copenhot, a unique take on the Nordic sauna experience, and it's my new favorite thing to do in the city. Tucked out on Refshaleøen is CopenHot, with hot tubs, cold plunge tubs and saunas all overlook

entry.title: Curvy girl travel outfit ideas for Amsterdam!! I just came back from the perfect spring trip in Europe and loved all my Amsterdam outfits. Definitely needed layers for the wind here! Which outfit is your fave? #amsterdam #ootd #travelstyle #netherlands #s
entry.content: Curvy girl travel outfit ideas for Amsterdam!! I just came back from the perfect spring trip in Europe and loved all my Amsterdam outfits. Definitely needed layers for the wind here! Which outfit is your fave? #amsterdam #ootd #travelstyle #netherlands #s

entry.title: yas you can ski in Copenhagen!! ⛷️ or just hang at the best rooftop bar & get those epic views for free at CopenHill #copenhagen #copenhill #denmark #copenhagenlife #copenhagenbar #ski #dansk #whimsysoul #copenhagentips #copenhagentravel
entry.content: yas you can ski in Copenhagen!! ⛷️ or just hang at the best rooftop bar & get those epic views for free at CopenHill #copenhagen #copenhill #denmark #copenhagenlife #copenhagenbar #ski #dansk #whimsysoul #copenhagentips #copenhagentravel

entry.title: Replying to @Amy Rae more snaps from Amsterdam! Helps the city is so photogenic 😉 I work with my husband to scout locations, style & take photos! It's a team effort. ✨Should i share more on our process? #amsterdam #netherlands #travelphotography #trave
entry.content: Replying to @Amy Rae more snaps from Amsterdam! Helps the city is so photogenic 😉 I work with my husband to scout locations, style & take photos! It's a team effort. ✨Should i share more on our process? #amsterdam #netherlands #travelphotography #trave

entry.title: Easily the best California music festival ❤️ can't beat Napa, wine & music! @BottleRock Napa Valley @Tors @The Beaches @JaM Cellars @hendricksgin @The Scarlet Opera @Paige Comrie #bottlerock #bottlerocknapa #napavalley #napa #musicfestival #festiv
entry.content: Easily the best California music festival ❤️ can't beat Napa, wine & music! @BottleRock Napa Valley @Tors @The Beaches @JaM Cellars @hendricksgin @The Scarlet Opera @Paige Comrie #bottlerock #bottlerocknapa #napavalley #napa #musicfestival #festiv

entry.title: was not expecting THIS view of London from my hotel room! I booked last minute so assumed they would stick me in a room facing a wall but this was amazing! Loved falling asleep to the view of the Tower of London and Tower Bridge! 📌 Citizen M hotel tower
entry.content: was not expecting THIS view of London from my hotel room! I booked last minute so assumed they would stick me in a room facing a wall but this was amazing! Loved falling asleep to the view of the Tower of London and Tower Bridge! 📌 Citizen M hotel tower

entry.title: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’
entry.content: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
